summary: Plan-mode classification only. #84872 remains the canonical issue for the Perplexity search_context_size feature request. #86338 is the matching implementation PR but is draft and still blocked by review/proof readiness, so no close or merge is planned. Hydrated linked PR #85828 is a separate Perplexity model override effort and should remain outside this duplicate family.

actions.reason: #84872 is the clearest open root-cause report and should remain the canonical thread for search_context_size validation and follow-up.

#86338 is the matching candidate fix for #84872, but draft status, unresolved ClawSweeper proof/readiness comments, and cross-PR conflict make merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout unsafe in this plan.
#85828 shares code surface with #86338 but has a different root cause and should not be deduped, closed, merged, or treated as the canonical fix for this cluster.
